overview.name: HTTP File Payload
overview.description:
This scenario verifies API support for file-based request payload.
Test flow includes: 1. Send POST request with request body loaded from external file. 2. Verify response status = 201. 5. Reset in-memory storage after test.
This scenario validates: - Request body loading from external file - JSON payload processing from file - Entity creation from file-based payload - Stored entity retrieval

http.comment: Step 1-2. Send POST request with JSON payload from external file
Step 5. Reset entity storage after file payload test
